rulings.Case Title: DAVID RAYNOR ET AL VS. CRAIG LIPTON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injuction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 18, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFFs DAVID RAYNOR and ERIN DOLLY's Motion For Preliminary Injuction continued to December 17, 2019 per October 16, 2019 ex-parte order. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ANGELA LEUNG VS. STONESTOWN SHOPPING CENTER, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 18, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT STONESTOWN MEDICAL BUILDING, LLC's DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to November 4, 2019 on Court's own motion. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ANGELA LEUNG VS. STONESTOWN SHOPPING CENTER, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 18, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT STONESTOWN SHOPPING CENTER, LP's DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to November 4, 2019 on Court's own motion. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. RICHARD KIWATA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Appointment Of Receiver
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 18, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFFs CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA BY AND Notice Of Motion For Appointment Of Receiver continued to October 24, 2019 for defendant to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of all papers filed in opposition to the motion on October 4, 2019 by no later than 9:00 a.m. on October 18, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Failure to comply with SFLR 2.7B by Defendant or Defendant's counsel in the future will result in motions being treated as unopposed. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JANE DOE VS. JOSEPH PATRICK GILLACH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Order Granting Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 18, 2019 line 4. PLAINTIFF JANE DOE's Motion For Order Granting Leave To File First Amended Complaint GRANTED. No opposition filed. Plaintiff and Plaintiff's counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. Failure to comply will result in motions being taken off calendar. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PAULA HAGAN BENNETT VS. BERNARD JOSEPH HAGAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 18, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT MARK SCHULMAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to October 23, 2019 to be heard with other pending motion. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of opposition no later than 9:00 a.m. on October 18, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Failure to comply with SFLR 2.7B by Plaintiff or Plaintiff's counsel in the future will result in motions being treated as unopposed. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THUY TIEN CAPITAL INC. DBA BOBO DRINKS VS. 235 JEFFERSON STREET LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 18, 2019 line 6, DEFENDANT 235 JEFFERSON STREET LLC's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005. Motion filed on October 5, 2019 (served by mail on October 1, 2019) and calendared for October 18, 2019. Additionally, counsel failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B. No courtesy copy of the motion received; only two copies of the proposed order. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. VLADIMIR IVANOV ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 18, 2019 line 7, PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LEONARDO N DIGIOVANNI VS. OMAR GARIBAY OLIVERA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Verified Complaint For Money Damages; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 18, 2019 line 8, PLAINTIFF LEONARDO DIGIOVANNI's Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Verified Complaint For Money Damages GRANTED. No opposition filed. Plaintiff to file and serve Second Amended Complaint forthwith. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: RIMMA BOSHERNITSAN ET AL VS. BELVIA BACH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 18, 2019 line 9, DEFENDANTs BELVIA BACH, AMY BACH, ANDREW NGUYEN, ALLISON NGUYEN, and ASHLEE NGUYEN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. For the purposes of SFRO 37.9(a)(8) a landlord is a "natural person" or "a group of natural persons." The property is owned by a trust and not a "natural person." The drafters of SFRO and Rules and Regulations limited the definition of the landlord as stated above and excluded non-natural persons thereby. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JORGE E. CACERES VS. DAVID PEDREMPOUR
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 18, 2019 line 10, DEFENDANT DAVID PEDRAMPOUR's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Hearing Required to address whether Complaint could be amended re service of form 1007. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: BRICK & TIMBER, INC. VS. JENNIFER MCKAY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 18, 2019 line 11, DEFENDANTs JENNIFER MCKAY and SHANNON MCKAY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDR, dismissal on file. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JASON DRUMMOND VS. ROBERT L. STEVENSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 18, 2019 line 12, DEFENDANT ROBERT STEVENSON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges compliance. Whether this allegation is true cannot be addressed at this stage of the litigation. Defendant's introduction of authority (some of which is not citable) and RJN request with reply is not going to be considered. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: VANGUARD PROPERTY MANAGEMENT VS. KEVIN ALEXANDER DAVIDSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 18, 2019 line 13, DEFENDANT KEVIN DAVIDSON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint on file. = (501/CFH)
